distractors.off_target_set: Quantities that are directly measurable; decisions insensitive to probability range; meta-questions about probabilistic thinking
distractors.description: Items where the number is knowable, or where the decision doesn't depend on the probability estimate

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND interval_coverage_accuracy >= 0.80
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
